title: oplismenus limosus
intro: Oplismenus limosus, also known as Slender False Brome, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Oplismenus limosus are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds.
